---
id: get-project-members
title: "Get all members associated with this project"
description: "This endpoint requires the user to be a member of the project with the role `OWNER` or `DEVELOPER`."
sidebar_label: "Get all members associated with this project"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get all members associated with this project"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/projects/{project}/members"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint requires the user to be a member of the project with the role `OWNER` or `DEVELOPER`.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
